audit_items.proof_trace: ber_strdup can return NULL on memory allocation failure; ldif_open_url proceeds to call strchr(p, '/') and ldap_pvt_hex_unescape(p) without checking for NULL, causing null pointer dereference.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker supplies LDIF file with include: directive; when system memory exhausted, ber_strdup fails returning NULL, leading to crash via null pointer dereference in strchr or ldap_pvt_hex_unescape.
